calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-03-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Enest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): BST Transportation and Courtland Byers as follows:
Principal $41,728.51
Prejudgment Interest $3,223.26
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $410.00 for a total of $47,861.77 and Plaintiff is entitled to the leased equipment listed in the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
